arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Newcastle v Wolves: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: 'It's a cracker' - Osula scores first Newcastle goal
arts.sum: William Osula scores a "rocket" as Newcastle take a 3-1 lead against Bromley in the FA Cup third round.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United said to be asking for $15m to sell player this month
arts.sum: Newcastle United are asking for $15m to sell Miguel Almirón this month, with River Plate still interested in him. That’s according to Soy del Millo, who report that the Argentine side have already been in touch about a move this month. They state that El Millonario ‘conducted a survey’ for the Paraguayan forward after months The post Newcastle United said to be asking for $15m to sell player this month appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe sends Newcastle PSR warning after being forced to offload star in 'the last sale we wanted to make' - as the Magpies boss looks to hold onto more academy players
arts.sum: CRAIG HOPE: The Magpies boss insists the club had no choice but to sell the star last June. Without it, he says, they would have faced a Premier League points deduction.

arts.ttl: Newcastle have made a ‘concrete approach’ for ‘outstanding’ attacker Arsenal want to sign – journalist

arts.ttl: Five players for your Fantasy team this week
arts.sum: Gameweek 21 features some exciting midweek Premier League clashes and Enda McElhinney has picked out five players to include in your Fantasy Football team.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United make mockery of 'ceiling' after Amanda Staveley was left turning the air blue
arts.sum: While Newcastle have a 25-man squad, like everyone else, Howe's reference to 'numbers' hints at the greater depth some of the Magpies' rivals have and the more a club spends on wages in the Premier League, historically, the more points they pick up per game. Eddie Howe has declared 'anything is possible' for Newcastle United this season as the Magpies bid to keep their winning run going.

arts.ttl: Newest NUFC signing has already told Howe what he can do with 'prove it' claim
arts.sum: Dinamo Tbilisi will continue to oversee Salia's development until he turns 18 later this year before the youngster is thrown in amongst Newcastle's other exciting young talent to see if he can be the next exciting teen to burst into Eddie Howe's first-team plans. The youngster also spoke, in English, for the first time about his imminent switch, offering plenty of clues as to what type of player Newcastle have signed.

Wolves restored the “positive energy” Vitor Pereira was looking for on Saturday by winning at Bristol City in the third round of the Emirates FA Cup. It provided a perfect response to the head coach’s first defeat in the dugout, with Rayan Ait-Nouri and Rodrigo Gomes scoring against the Robins. The December Player of the Month Alexander Isak looks set to return to the Newcastle side, having missed their FA Cup tie with Bromley at the weekend.

arts.ttl: Is Agbadou the signing to keep Wolves away from relegation?
arts.sum: Yet close followers of the 27-year-old Ivory Coast international, especially during the two-and-a-half-year spell that has just come to an end at Reims in France's Ligue 1, will have noticed that technical gifts are his most apparent qualities. In two seasons there, Agbadou shone while being used in several positions, including right-back, centre-back, and defensive midfielder.
